question: Find the county seats of the two non‑NYC New York counties with the highest total mental health service recipients during the two‑year window starting four years before the year (within 2017–2022) with the highest Charter flight passengers over Los Angeles international airports. 1.fact: Filtering FlightType = "Charter" and summing Passenger_Count by year (from ReportPeriod) for 2017-2022, the maximum total is 25993 in 2021.

2.fact: According to the NY mental health profiles dataset (<node_1 answer - 4> and <node_1 answer - 3>), excluding NYC counties, the top 2 NY counties by total mental health service recipients are Erie County (83,049 recipients) and Monroe County (74,299 recipients).
